name: Fastmail CLI
description: Email, contacts, and calendar tools via the Fastmail CLI

cliCommand.description: Path or alias for the fastmail CLI (default: 'fastmail')

autoDiscover.description: Auto-discover disabled categories from server at startup (requires authenticated CLI)

disabledCategories.description: Tool categories to hide (must match server permissions config)

requireApprovals.description: Require user approval before sending emails, reading email content, or bulk operations
